title: scabiosa gramuntia subsp. agrestis
intro: Scabiosa gramuntia subsp. agrestis, also known as Wild Scabious, is a plant species belonging to the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Wild Scabious include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Wild Scabious can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various methods of consumption and application.
